animation.css_keyframes: @keyframes fly_goof { 0% { transform: translate(-20vw, 55vh) rotate(10deg); } 40% { transform: translate(40vw, 25vh) rotate(-15deg); } 75% { transform: translate(85vw, 65vh) rotate(20deg); } 100% { transform: translate(120vw, 45vh) rotate(-5deg); } }

@keyframes fly_hawk { 0% { transform: translate(-20vw, 10vh) rotate(10deg); } 25% { transform: translate(15vw, 60vh) rotate(25deg); } 50% { transform: translate(50vw, 70vh) rotate(0deg); } 75% { transform: translate(85vw, 30vh) rotate(-15deg); } 100% { transform: translate(120vw, 15vh) rotate(-5deg); } }

@keyframes fly_WAVY { 0% { transform: translate(-20vw, 50vh) scale(1.0) rotate(0deg); } 15% { transform: translate(10vw, 15vh) scale(0.85) rotate(-15deg); } 35% { transform: translate(35vw, 75vh) scale(1.15) rotate(10deg); } 55% { transform: translate(65vw, 25vh) scale(0.9) rotate(-12deg); } 75% { transform: translate(90vw, 65vh) scale(1.1) rotate(15deg); } 100% { transform: translate(120vw, 20vh) scale(0.95) rotate(-10deg); } }

@keyframes fly_DUCK { 0% { transform: translate(-20vw, 50vh) rotate(5deg) scale(1); } 15% { transform: translate(5vw, 20vh) rotate(-15deg) scale(0.9); } 35% { transform: translate(30vw, 75vh) rotate(15deg) scale(1.15); } 55% { transform: translate(60vw, 15vh) rotate(-10deg) scale(0.85); } 75% { transform: translate(90vw, 60vh) rotate(10deg) scale(1.1); } 100% { transform: translate(120vw, 35vh) rotate(-5deg) scale(1); } }
